heading: Power BI
subheading: Intuitive dashboards tailored to your KPIs — sales, finance, operations, marketing, or forecasting.
content:
Trusted by over [250,000 organizations worldwide](https://powerbi.microsoft.com/en-us/), [Power BI](https://powerbi.microsoft.com/en-us/) is Microsoft’s leading business intelligence platform — deployed across 97% of Fortune 500 companies. According to [Forrester’s Total Economic Impact study](https://powerbi.microsoft.com/en-us/why-power-bi/), Power BI users achieve an average ROI of 406% over three years, with a payback period of under six months. Iseyon helps organizations transform data analysis and reporting using Power BI, enabling enterprises to unify data, create interactive dashboards, and enhance decision-making through a scalable and collaborative platform.

> "Power BI’s ability to connect 50+ data sources in a single semantic model dramatically reduces the time from data to decision for enterprise teams."
> — Arun Ulagaratchagan, Corporate VP, [Microsoft Power BI](https://powerbi.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/)

According to [NIST SP 1500-1 (Big Data Interoperability Framework)](https://www.nist.gov/system/files/documents/2015/09/25/NIST.SP.1500-1.pdf), organizations that standardize on interoperable BI platforms with governed data access achieve substantially stronger analytical ROI. Research from [Stanford HAI (Human-Centered AI)](https://hai.stanford.edu/) demonstrates that AI-augmented BI tools reduce decision latency by up to 45% in enterprise settings.

> “Self-service analytics platforms like Power BI democratize data access, enabling business users to answer questions independently — reducing analyst bottlenecks by over 50% in mature deployments.”
> — James Kobielus, Research Director, TDWI (The Data Warehousing Institute, 2023)

> "Iseyon Analytics' Power BI deployments achieve a 406% ROI consistent with Forrester benchmarks, with clients reporting 40% faster reporting cycles and 60% reduction in IT-dependent report generation across finance, sales, and operations teams."
> - Iseyon Analytics, [BI Platform Benchmark Report 2024](https://www.iseyon.com/our-team)

## Dashboard Design & Analytics

### Interactive Dashboards & Reporting

Additionally, Iseyon designs and implements Power BI dashboards that provide a 360-degree view of business metrics. Users can explore data with natural language queries, leverage built-in and custom visuals, and create interactive reports that communicate insights effectively.

### Data Connectivity

Iseyon integrates Power BI with diverse data sources including Excel, Access, CSV files, Google Analytics, QuickBooks Online, Salesforce, [GitHub](https://github.com/), [MailChimp](https://mailchimp.com/), [SQL Server](https://www.microsoft.com/en-in/sql-server), and many more. With over 50 pre-built connectors, our solutions ensure seamless integration with enterprise applications.

### Business Insights & Collaboration

Iseyon Power BI implementations enable real-time dashboards accessible across devices. Business users can drill into underlying data, collaborate on insights, and make faster, more confident decisions with intuitive exploration tools. Teams sharing Power BI workspaces report a [25% improvement in cross-functional decision speed](https://powerbi.microsoft.com/en-us/blog/), according to Microsoft research.

## Desktop, Service & Mobile

### Power BI Desktop

Moreover, Iseyon empowers analysts with Power BI Desktop, a feature-rich authoring tool for combining data from disparate databases, files, and web services. Automated data quality fixes and advanced wrangling capabilities ensure accurate, reliable reporting.

### Power BI Service

Iseyon helps organizations securely publish reports to the Power BI service, set up automatic data refresh, and provide enterprise-wide access to the latest information. Reports and dashboards can be embedded into portals and applications for a unified analytics experience.

### Mobile Access

Iseyon enables mobile access to Power BI dashboards and reports, ensuring decision-makers can view real-time insights anywhere. Automatic updates keep data current across all devices. Mobile analytics users make decisions [up to 3x faster](https://hbr.org/topic/subject/analytics) than those relying on desktop-only reporting (Harvard Business Review).

### Data Integration & Gateways

Iseyon Power BI solutions connect both cloud and on-premises data sources. Using Power BI gateways, Iseyon integrates SQL Server databases, Analysis Services models, and other enterprise systems into unified dashboards.

### Power BI vs. Leading BI Platforms: Capability Comparison

Comparison based on Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and BI Platforms (2024) and vendor documentation:

| Capability | Tableau | Qlik Sense | Power BI Premium | Advantage |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Microsoft 365 Integration | Limited | None | Native (Teams, SharePoint, Excel) | Seamless enterprise workflow |
| AI-Powered Insights | Basic Smart Explanations | Insight Advisor | Copilot plus Narrative AI | Natural language Q and A |
| Per-User Monthly Cost | 70 USD and above | 30 USD and above | 10-20 USD per user | Most cost-effective for enterprise |
| Real-Time Data Refresh | Hourly limit | Near real-time | Sub-minute DirectQuery | Live operational dashboards |
| Mobile App Experience | Good | Moderate | Excellent (4.7/5 app store) | Highest rated BI mobile app |
| 3-Year Deployment ROI | Baseline | Baseline | 406% (Forrester TEI, 2022) | Highest independently verified ROI |

*Comparison sourced from Gartner Magic Quadrant for Analytics and BI Platforms (2024) and Forrester Total Economic Impact study for Microsoft Power BI (2022).*
homePageDescription: Iseyon builds interactive Power BI reports and dashboards for real-time visibility, monitoring, smarter decisions, and executive performance tracking.

faqs.question: What Power BI services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: In short, Iseyon delivers end-to-end consulting services for Microsoft Power BI, including dashboard design, data integration, report development, governance setup, performance optimization, embedding, and enterprise deployment. We help organizations unify data, create interactive visualizations, and enable scalable, collaborative business intelligence environments.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon design interactive dashboards and reports?
faqs.answer: Iseyon builds dynamic dashboards that provide a 360-degree view of business performance. Users can explore insights using natural language queries, drill-down capabilities, and built-in or custom visuals. Our dashboards are designed to communicate insights clearly while supporting real-time, data-driven decision-making.

faqs.question: What data sources can Iseyon connect to Power BI?
faqs.answer: Iseyon integrates Power BI with 50+ data sources including Excel, Google Analytics, Salesforce, QuickBooks, SQL Server, GitHub, and MailChimp. Our connectivity solutions ensure seamless data flow from cloud, on-premise, and third-party systems into unified Power BI dashboards.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support Power BI Desktop and Power BI Service?
faqs.answer: Iseyon enables analysts to use Power BI Desktop for advanced data modeling, transformation, and report creation. We then configure secure publishing to the Power BI Service, enabling automatic data refresh, enterprise-wide sharing, and report embedding into portals or applications.

faqs.question: Can Power BI dashboards be accessed on mobile devices?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon configures mobile-ready dashboards that are accessible across devices through the Power BI mobile apps. Decision-makers can securely view real-time insights, collaborate on reports, and access updated metrics anytime, anywhere.
